mapper.sql: wrk_git_acct_idx AS idx, wrk_git_acct_uuid AS uuid, mbr_acct_idx, prvd_cd, acct_lbl, auth_nm, acs_tokn_enc, use_yn, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at

p.wrk_git_prj_idx AS idx, p.wrk_git_prj_uuid AS uuid, p.wrk_git_acct_idx, p.mbr_acct_idx, p.prj_nm, p.repo_url, p.use_yn, p.created_by, p.updated_by, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.del_at, a.wrk_git_acct_uuid AS git_account_uuid, a.acct_lbl AS git_account_label, a.prvd_cd, a.auth_nm, a.acs_tokn_enc
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_wrk_git_acct WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL ORDER BY use_yn DESC, updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM tb_wrk_git_acct WHERE wrk_git_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_wrk_git_acct SET prvd_cd = #{prvdCd}, acct_lbl = #{acctLbl}, auth_nm = #{authNm}, acs_tokn_enc = #{acsToknEnc}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE wrk_git_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_wrk_git_acct SET del_at = now(), updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE wrk_git_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tb_wrk_git_prj p INNER JOIN tb_wrk_git_acct a ON a.wrk_git_acct_idx = p.wrk_git_acct_idx WHERE p.mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND p.del_at IS NULL AND a.del_at IS NULL
AND a.wrk_git_acct_uuid = CAST(#{gitAccountUuid} AS UUID)
ORDER BY p.use_yn DESC, p.updated_at DESC, p.created_at DESC

SELECT FROM tb_wrk_git_prj p INNER JOIN tb_wrk_git_acct a ON a.wrk_git_acct_idx = p.wrk_git_acct_idx WHERE p.mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND p.del_at IS NULL AND a.del_at IS NULL AND p.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY a.acct_lbl ASC, p.prj_nm ASC

SELECT FROM tb_wrk_git_prj p INNER JOIN tb_wrk_git_acct a ON a.wrk_git_acct_idx = p.wrk_git_acct_idx WHERE p.wrk_git_prj_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND p.mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND p.del_at IS NULL AND a.del_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM tb_wrk_git_prj p INNER JOIN tb_wrk_git_acct a ON a.wrk_git_acct_idx = p.wrk_git_acct_idx WHERE p.wrk_git_prj_idx = #{idx} AND p.mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND p.del_at IS NULL AND a.del_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM tb_wrk_git_prj p INNER JOIN tb_wrk_git_acct a ON a.wrk_git_acct_idx = p.wrk_git_acct_idx WHERE p.mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND p.del_at IS NULL AND a.del_at IS NULL AND p.wrk_git_prj_uuid IN
CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_wrk_git_prj SET wrk_git_acct_idx = #{wrkGitAcctIdx}, prj_nm = #{prjNm}, repo_url = #{repoUrl}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE wrk_git_prj_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_wrk_git_prj SET del_at = now(), updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE wrk_git_prj_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_wrk_unit_git_prj wgp INNER JOIN tb_wrk_git_prj p ON p.wrk_git_prj_idx = wgp.wrk_git_prj_idx INNER JOIN tb_wrk_git_acct a ON a.wrk_git_acct_idx = p.wrk_git_acct_idx WHERE wgp.work_unit_idx = #{workUnitIdx} AND wgp.mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND wgp.del_at IS NULL AND p.del_at IS NULL AND a.del_at IS NULL ORDER BY a.acct_lbl ASC, p.prj_nm ASC
